# Kagiampakis Residences

> Traditional stone villa holiday rental in Avdou, Heraklion region, Crete, Greece.

## Summary

Kagiampakis Residences is a fully renovated two-storey stone house hosted by the Kagiampakis family. It sleeps up to six guests across two bedrooms, with a wood-burning stove, equipped kitchen, private courtyard, mountain views, and free parking. The property is listed on Airbnb with five-star reviews.

## Booking & contact

- Website home: /
- Airbnb listing: https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/34710248?unique_share_id=0b129400-faa7-4d3f-97f7-b71c5da96ff6
- WhatsApp host (Xrisa): wa.me/306982210506
- Email: Xrisa.xk@hotmail.gr
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kagiampakis_residences

## Location

Village of Avdou, Crete — approximately 35 km from Heraklion. Near Lasithi Plateau, Hersonissos beaches, and rural attractions.
